# Summary

## Changes

## Testing

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun tests/verify-end-to-end.ts` (if tool output changed)
- [ ] Relevant single test(s):

## Docs

- [ ] README updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] CHANGELOG `[Unreleased]` updated (user-visible changes)
- [ ] Tool description / `Answers:` phrasing updated (if tool routing changed)
- [ ] Config changes or new env overrides noted

## Checklist

- [ ] Behavior is backward compatible or clearly documented
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] `src/` imports use `.js` extensions (not `.ts`)
